name: guest-sponsor-info-function
description: Azure Function proxy for /me/sponsors — serves guest sponsor data to the SPFx web part.

scripts.build:production: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));fs.cpSync('host.json','dist/host.json');pkg.main='src/getGuestSponsors.js';delete pkg.devDependencies;delete pkg.scripts;fs.writeFileSync('dist/package.json',JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2));" && npm install --omit=dev --prefix dist
scripts.package: npm run build:production && cd dist && zip -r ../guest-sponsor-info-function.zip .
